data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Operational CI provisioning (no repo code change). Evidence recorded: REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY re-set from the verified SSM key (public half registered on 594c); a reconcile-bridge run (29537136608) produced signed event 8b72ddf6 (EDIT on 79da by 594c) that VERIFIES (absent from the non-verified report). The completion verifier cannot check GitHub-secret/CI runtime state from a code tree, so closing on the recorded evidence.". Session: e533bbc2-be02-4c77-890b-73fde9abf109.
